prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约8283名→7327名→7867名→3843名→2117名，整体呈大幅上升趋势（位次数字持续减小），近两年尤为显著，2024年较2023年前移约4024名，2025年较2024年前移约1726名，2025年基准位次约2117名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年90人、2022年56人、2023年30人、2024年15人、2025年11人，呈持续大幅缩减趋势；2026年计划为11人，与2025年持平，计划缩减趋势已趋稳，对竞争格局的边际影响较小。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第11名、2022年第13名、2023年第13名、2024年第16名、2025年第14名、2026年第12名，近年排名稳居全国前16名，2026年回升至第12名，学校综合实力与品牌号召力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情冲击；抖音热度总排名第10（高热），综合热度约454万，国防七子标签在短视频平台获得广泛关注，反映报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线异常信号（中关注），但2025年位次大幅前移表明热度已回升；第五轮学科评估中，力学、机械工程、材料科学与工程、环境科学与工程获A+，仪器科学与技术、控制科学与工程、土木工程、数学、电气工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、软件工程获A，信息与通信工程、光学工程、动力工程及工程热物理、建筑学、航空宇航科学与技术获A-，A类学科总数达17个，工科实力突出，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 工科试验班（院士特色班、未来技术拔尖班等）涵盖计算机、人工智能、自动化、机器人等热门方向，社会热度高；浙江省2026年普通高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人增长约37.6%，竞争显著加剧；哈尔滨工业大学位于黑龙江省，非本省招生，在浙江省招生占比极小（2025年约1.5%），地域距离因素可能对部分考生报考意愿有轻微抑制，但近年位次持续前移表明该影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅前移（近两年累计前移约5750名）、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、学校软科排名回升至第12名、抖音高热反映报考关注度高、优势学科实力强劲等正向因素，以及浙江省考生总数大幅增长约37.6%带来的竞争加剧反向因素，在2025年基准2117名基础上小幅上调，预测2026年最低录取位次约2117名，区间1964–2470名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 8283 → 7327 → 7867 → 3843 → 2117, showing a significant upward trend (ranking numbers continuously decreasing), especially in the last two years. In 2024, the ranking moved forward by about 4024 places compared to 2023, and in 2025, it moved forward by about 1726 places compared to 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2117. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Comprehensive category was 90 in 2021, 56 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, showing a continuous and significant reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 11, the same as 2025, indicating that the reduction trend has stabilized, with marginal impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science University Rankings, it ranked 11th in 2021, 13th in 2022, 13th in 2023, 16th in 2024, 14th in 2025, and 12th in 2026. In recent years, it has consistently ranked among the top 16 nationally, rising to 12th in 2026, indicating strong comprehensive strength and brand appeal. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion shocks. It ranks 10th in overall Douyin popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive heat index of about 4.54 million. The 'National Defense Seven Sons' label has gained widespread attention on short video platforms, reflecting high application interest. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but the significant forward movement in rankings in 2025 indicates that popularity has rebounded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Environmental Science and Engineering received A+; Instrument Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mathematics, Electrical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering received A; Information and Communication Engineering, Optical Engineering, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Architecture, and Aerospace Science and Technology received A-. The total number of A-class disciplines reaches 17, highlighting strong engineering strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering Experimental Classes (Academician Special Class, Future Technology Top Class, etc.) cover popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, and Robotics, with high social popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, an increase of about 37.6% compared to 291,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, not within the province, and its enrollment proportion in Zhejiang is very small (about 1.5% in 2025). The geographical distance factor may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply, but the continuous forward movement of rankings in recent years indicates that this impact is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering positive factors such as the continuous significant forward movement of historical rankings (cumulative forward movement of about 5750 places in the last two years), the 2026 enrollment plan being the same as 2025, the university's Soft Science ranking rising to 12th, high Douyin popularity reflecting high application interest, and strong advantageous disciplines, as well as the negative factor of intensified competition due to a significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of candidates in Zhejiang Province, based on the 2025 baseline of 2117, a slight upward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 2117, with a range of 1964–2470.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2217, range 1964–2470. Candidates within the range are advised to target Tier 2 (Future Technology Top Class) as the main goal, Tier 1 (Academician Special Class series) as a stretch, and Tier 3 (Embodied Intelligence/Artificial Intelligence) as a safety. Candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 1964) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors. All majors belong to the Engineering Experimental Class category, covering popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, and Robotics, with all disciplines rated A-class, high social popularity, and outstanding overall application value.
